diff.name: diff
diff.title: Diff Utilities
diff.description: Pure functions for parsing unified diffs, computing diffs from text, and word-level diff highlighting. No React dependency.

compose-refs.name: compose-refs
compose-refs.title: composeRefs
compose-refs.description: Utility to compose multiple React refs into a single ref callback. Use when a component needs an internal ref and must also forward an external ref prop (React 19 ref-as-prop pattern).

resolve-tab-target.name: resolve-tab-target
resolve-tab-target.title: resolveTabTarget
resolve-tab-target.description: Roving tabindex utility — determines which item in a group should be the tab target based on selection state and disabled status.

selectable-variants.name: selectable-variants
selectable-variants.title: Selectable Variants
selectable-variants.description: Shared CVA variant definitions for selectable items (checkbox, radio, etc.)

content.text: bg-secondary text-foreground font-bold before:absolute before:left-0 before:top-0 before:bottom-0 before:w-1 before:bg-foreground

input-variants.name: input-variants
input-variants.title: Input Variants
input-variants.description: Shared CVA variant definitions for input-family components (input, textarea)

content.text: flex w-full bg-background border border-border text-foreground font-mono placeholder:text-foreground/50 transition-colors focus:border-foreground focus:ring-1 focus:ring-foreground focus:outline-none disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed

focus.name: focus
focus.title: Focus Utilities
focus.description: Shared focusable element CSS selector for focus management, auto-focus, and focus-trap logic.

source.raw:
export const FOCUSABLE_SELECTOR =
  'button:not([disabled]), [href], input:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"]):not([disabled])';

step-status.name: step-status
step-status.title: Step Status
step-status.description: Shared StepStatus type for stepper components (completed, active, pending, error).

search.name: search
search.title: Search Utilities
search.description: Case-insensitive search matching utility for filtering items by text query.
